positive: A central, stylized composition featuring a graceful woodland animal silhouette, such as a deer or a fox, partially surrounded by blooming botanical elements like stylized mandalas of flowers and leaves. The style should be intricate negative space art with bold linework (line art style) and solid, deep color blocking (forest green, sapphire blue, and burnt orange). The composition must be symmetrical and designed for circular print placement on clothing. Use a high contrast, clean aesthetic, with minimal shading and maximum graphic impact. Overhead, top-down view, perfect symmetry, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, smudge, grainy, jpeg artifacts, messy, gradient, photorealism, realistic lighting
